---
title: "Audio Reporting"
---

-   [A look into The Daily's coverage of the Deering Meadow encampment](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2024/04/27/campus/deering-encampment/a-look-into-the-dailys-pro-palestine-encampment-coverage/)

![Behind the scenes of one of my audio stories for Medill on the Hill. (Photo credit to fellow reporter Ben Shapiro)](audiopic.jpeg)

*Miscellaneous*

-   [Medill Trial Monitors](https://medilltrialmonitors.substack.com/p/smart-combats-substance-use-disorder)
